name: Peanut Butter Sandwich Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour and mix it thoroughly with the salt, sugar, and baking powder.
2. Add the peanut butter to the dry ingredients and blend using a pastry blender until combined.
3. Beat the egg and add the milk and orange extract; blend well.
4. Pour the wet mixture into the dry mixture and stir until fully incorporated but do not beat.
5. Grease a 9 x 5-inch loaf pan with butter or oil.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake in a preheated oven set to 350°F (175°C) for 50-55 minutes.
7. Allow the loaf to cool completely before slicing.
